name: Mini Icon Stake Light Outdoor Lantern Blue Star - Sun Squad™
description:
Light up any outdoor area with this Mini Icon Stake Light Outdoor Lantern from Sun Squad™. This plastic stake light features a blue base with a clear star icon on top for a seasonal vibe. Its weather-resistant finish makes it suitable for outdoor use. Designed with an integrated LED bulb, this solar-powered stake light comes with a base slide switch for easy operation.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
